languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

languages.text: "О меровском штрафном легионе не слышали уже более сотни лет. Даже самые старые книги в библиотеке династии фон Валанциус считают их канувшей в пустоту легендой".
languages.translation_comment: characters enter in the camp of unfamiliar guardsmen

languages.text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."
languages.original_text: "О меровском штрафном легионе не слышали уже более сотни лет. Даже самые старые книги в библиотеке династии фон Валанциус считают их канувшей в пустоту легендой".

traits.locale_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."
"No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."
"No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

languages.text: 「メロヴ懲罰連隊のことを耳にした者は、もう百年以上いない。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の図書館にある最も古い書物でさえ、彼らを歴史に忘れられた伝説として扱っている」
languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

traits.locale_text: 「メローヴ刑務所連隊」は百年以上前に消えたとされている。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の図書館にある最も古い本でも、歴史に忘れられた伝説として扱われている。
「メロヴ懲罰連隊のことを耳にした者は、もう百年以上いない。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の図書館にある最も古い書物でさえ、彼らを歴史に忘れられた伝説として扱っている」

languages.text: « Personne n'a entendu parler de la Légion Pénale de Merov depuis plus d'un siècle. Même les livres les plus anciens dans la bibliothèque des von Valancius la considèrent comme une légende tombée dans l'oubli. »
languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

traits.locale_text: « Personne n'a entendu parler de la Légion Pénale de Merov depuis plus d'un siècle. Même les livres les plus anciens dans la bibliothèque des von Valancius la considèrent comme une légende tombée dans l'oubli. »

languages.text: "Die Merov-Straflegion war seit mehr als hundert Jahren kein Thema mehr. Selbst die ältesten Bücher in der Valancius-Bibliothek betrachten sie als vergessene Legende."
languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

traits.locale_text: "Die Merov-Straflegion war seit mehr als hundert Jahren kein Thema mehr. Selbst die ältesten Bücher in der Valancius-Bibliothek betrachten sie als vergessene Legende."

languages.text: "Merov Ceza İnfaz Lejyonu'nun adını yüz yıldan fazladır kimse duymadı. Von Valancius kütüphanesindeki en eski kitaplar bile onları tarihin unuttuğu bir efsane olarak görüyor."
languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

traits.locale_text: "Merov Ceza İnfaz Lejyonu'nun adını yüz yıldan fazladır kimse duymadı. Von Valancius kütüphanesindeki en eski kitaplar bile onları tarihin unuttuğu bir efsane olarak görüyor."

languages.text: «Nadie ha oído hablar de la legión penal de Merov en más de un centenar de años. Hasta los libros más antiguos de la biblioteca de los von Valancius los considera una leyenda histórica largo tiempo olvidada».
languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

traits.locale_text: «Nadie ha oído hablar de la legión penal de Merov en más de un centenar de años. Hasta los libros más antiguos de la biblioteca de los von Valancius los considera una leyenda histórica largo tiempo olvidada».

languages.text: “一百多年来，无人再听闻梅罗夫判罪军团的消息。连冯·瓦兰修斯图书馆中最古老的典籍也视其为被历史遗忘的传说。”
languages.original_text: "No one has heard mention of the Merov Penal Legion in over a hundred years. Even the oldest books in the von Valancius library consider them a legend forgotten by history."

traits.locale_text: “一百多年来，无人再听闻梅罗夫判罪军团的消息。连冯·瓦兰修斯图书馆中最古老的典籍也视其为被历史遗忘的传说。”
